query_text: lightweight responsive trail running shoe with good grip

results.explanation: Salomon Speedcross 6 excels in: grip. Solid on: responsiveness. Review: "Not fast on roads but dominates technical trails." Review: "Not great on hard surfaces but in soft/technical terrain it's unbeatable." Review: "The grip is absolutely insane. Muddy trails, wet roots, loose gravel — the Speedcross grips everything."

Solid on: responsiveness, grip. Review: "A good crossover shoe." Review: "If you need serious trail grip or road speed, look elsewhere." Review: "Not as grippy as dedicated trail shoes but way better than road shoes off-road."
